items.name: Hellion Helmet (Taskmaster)
items.description:
A Hellion Taskmaster is a most wretched thing indeed. Given command of a retinue of up to 15 other Hellions, Taskmasters are the backbone of the fell mage’s army, the veterans of ambushes, raids, and combat action. It is a prestigious and perilous position in Hellion society; because the only way to become a Taskmaster is by defeating one and taking their place…

Only available in the FirstSight Homestore.

Full set: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Hellion&Category=1&CreatorName=FirstSight+UGC&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3
